caveat: Deterministic schematic only; not an empirical result and not counted as a manuscript data figure.

concept_references.large_page: external design-tool concept render (large/page layout); not part of the regeneration pipeline
concept_references.mobile_portrait: external design-tool concept render (mobile/portrait layout); not part of the regeneration pipeline

semantic_role: schematic front-matter cover for the sortition-to-NTQR evaluation pipeline

visual_contract.editable_layers: title, author, affiliation, ORCID, DOI, and source notes remain renderer-owned text
visual_contract.forbidden_claims: no exact performance values, DOI identifiers, or source claims are baked into the raster
visual_contract.reading_order: audited lottery -> representative vs single-bloc panel composition -> shared-confound error coupling -> NTQR agreement matrix -> phase-transition fan-out (recovery error vs within-bloc coupling), with a subordinate panel-size x bias case grid
